Hero.subtitle_prefix: If the tables are full but the cash isn't growing, your restaurant
Hero.subtitle_suffix: . I stop that leak from outside your operation, without stepping into your kitchen or interfering with your daily management.

FounderBanner.text: • PIONEER PROGRAM: SEEKING MY FIRST 5 SUCCESS STORIES • NO-RISK AUDIT • NO TAX ACCESS REQUIRED •

About.title: Kitchen-tested. Data-refined.
About.description1: I am not a corporate consultant. I’ve founded dark kitchens and led brigades from Tulum to Germany. I know the heat of the service and the frustration of working for free because the costs don't add up.
About.quote: "Good food doesn't sell itself. It sells if it leaves real money in your pocket."
About.description2: I merged fine dining discipline with linear algebra. My job is to let you focus on the pass while I ensure every ticket generates net profit, not just gross revenue.
About.image_quote: I speak your language: Order up. Margin up.

Methodology.title: You cook. I handle my line: automation.
Methodology.subtitle: I work in the background. The system operates in silence so that control stops being a burden and becomes peace of mind again.

01.title: Digital Audit
01.desc: Most decisions are made on mobile. If you aren't present there, they will choose someone else. I analyze your presence and digital channels: what they say about you, where they talk about you, and where demand is lost before reaching the register, without interfering with your daily operation.

02.title: No-Show Killer
02.desc: We slash no-shows and ensure bookings turn into occupied tables. Adapted to your channels and your way of working. Fewer empty chairs, more real income.

03.title: Operational Peace
03.desc: We visualize where the money goes and which parts of the business truly sustain the cash flow. Continuous supervision, no guesswork, and no need for you to be constantly on top of it.

radar.title: Profitability X-ray
radar.desc: We visualize where the money goes and which parts of the business truly sustain the cash flow. No guesses, no interference.

shield.title: Income Protection
shield.desc: We reduce cancellations, inefficiencies, and decisions that leave chairs or money in the air. Every adjustment seeks real stability.

tranquilidad.title: Operational Peace
tranquilidad.desc: Your business under control even when you are away. Less mental noise, more clarity, and more enjoyment of your craft.

results.title: System results in operation.
results.subtitle: What happens when you stop guessing and start making decisions with criteria.

0.title: Why your star dish is ruining you?

1.title: The lie of full tables: How to lose money with a full house.

2.title: Silent Operation: Optimize your margin without attracting prying eyes.

Footer.subtitle: Every day you open without control, your profit evaporates. Let’s shield your business today.
Footer.brand_desc: High-precision consulting. No fluff, no invasion. Systems that transform data into real margins for owners who want to earn more.

Metadata.keywords: Gastro-Consulting, Restaurant Margin, Cost Audit, Profit Optimization, Discrete Management

ShieldCalculator.upgrade_desc: Get the precise calculation (occupancy, seasons) and the copy-paste WhatsApp script to reduce this by 40%.
ShieldCalculator.email_desc: I will send you the Advanced Calculator and the Anti-No-Show Script immediately.

ShieldSection.description: Every empty table is money you never get back. Use the calculator to see exactly how much your 'no-shows' are costing you annually, and get the tool to stop it.

RadarQuiz.intro_desc: 70% of diners decide online before walking in. If your digital footprint is weak, you are losing customers to the competition right now.
RadarQuiz.q1_gmaps: Do you show up on Google Maps when searching for 'restaurant near me'?
RadarQuiz.q2_menu: Is your menu updated with photos from the last 60 days?
RadarQuiz.q3_reviews: Do you respond to negative reviews in less than 24h?
RadarQuiz.q4_rating: Is your average rating above 4.3 stars?
RadarQuiz.q5_speed: Does your website load in under 3 seconds on mobile?
RadarQuiz.gate_desc: Where should we send your full Digital Visibility Report?
RadarQuiz.desc_visible: Great work. You act like a Pro. Let's optimize margins now.
RadarQuiz.desc_partial: You are losing money. Customers find you, but choose someone else.
RadarQuiz.desc_invisible: Emergency. You simply do not exist for the modern diner.

ControlQualify.intro_title: Do you own your business, or does it own you?
ControlQualify.intro_desc: Most restaurateurs are employees of their own restaurant. Working double, earning half. The Pioneer Program installs control systems so you reclaim your life.
ControlQualify.q2_title: What is your average monthly revenue?
ControlQualify.q3_title: What keeps you awake at night?
ControlQualify.q4_title: Last step. Where should we send the audit?
ControlQualify.q4_desc: We will analyze your profile and if you fit, we'll contact you for a free strategy session.
ControlQualify.success_desc: We have successfully received your data. Our team will review your profile within the next 24 hours.
